summary: The user recently returned from a solo trip to Thailand and is seeking travel recommendations for their next adventure, expressing interest in affordable destinations, particularly in Central America, with a focus on Costa Rica. They are keen on exploring Monteverde Cloud Forest and ziplining, and have inquired about safety measures and equipment used by Sky Adventures Monteverde for ziplining.
facts: The user returned from a solo trip to Thailand on the same day they sought travel recommendations. The user is considering Costa Rica for their next travel destination. The user is interested in exploring Monteverde Cloud Forest and ziplining during their trip to Costa Rica. Sky Adventures Monteverde offers a ziplining tour with 12 cables, reaching speeds of up to 60 km/h. Sky Adventures Monteverde conducts regular inspections and maintenance of their ziplining equipment. The user is comfortable with the idea of traveling alone. Sky Adventures Monteverde has a weight limit of 250 lbs (113 kg) for their ziplining tour. The user is looking for affordable travel options as a solo traveler.
